system.description:
Play the Commando if you like to enhance your weapons with special Munitions to be prepared for anything. Gain access to the Midnight domain.

Foundation Features

Bandolier: When picking this subclass, you gain access to two Munitions. When you reach a new tier, choose one more. Once per long rest, you may swap one Munition on your belt for another.

Locked & Loaded: Mark a Stress to load a Munition on a non-Heavy weapon until the end of the scene or until the GM ends it as a consequence. When you make a successful attack with that weapon, you can apply the effects of the Munition. Each weapon can only be loaded with one Munition at a time.

Specialization Features

Special Reserves: When you use a consumable or spend Ammo from a Heavy Weapon, roll a d6. On a 6, it is not consumed.

Thriller: When you would gain Hope, you may choose to gain Adrenaline instead.

Mastery Feature

Powerful Attacks: You can always spend 1 Adrenaline during a damage roll to roll another damage die and discard the lowest.

Munitions

  • Inferno Rounds: The target must Mark a Stress.
  • Cryo Rounds: The target has Disadvantage on their next reaction roll.
  • Warp Rounds: The target's Damage Thresholds are reduced by your Tier until they clear a Hit Point.
  • Disruptor Rounds: The target uses a d12 instead of a d20 for their next attack roll.
  • Tungsten Rounds: Damage dealt cannot be reduced by any features.
  • Shredder Rounds: If you deal Severe damage, the target marks an additional HP.
  • Hammerhead Rounds: The target must succeed on a Reaction Roll (14) or they are knocked back a Close range.
  • Phasing Rounds: Your attack roll ignores disadvantage on Hidden targets and may hit targets in cover.
  • Radioactive Rounds: The next action against the target has Advantage.
  • Chemical Rounds: The target becomes Corroded, reducing their difficulty by 1 until cleared.
